title: iris spuria subsp. demetrii
intro: Iris spuria subsp. demetrii is a subspecies of the Iris spuria plant, commonly known as the Dalmatian iris or Balkan iris, a flowering plant native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Iris spuria subsp. demetrii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include its use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
